defects.summary: Audio output stops when MOST ring communication breaks - Bus Timeout
defects.description:
Problem: Audio suddenly stops playing while streaming music. HMI shows media player as PLAYING but there is no sound output.

Steps to Reproduce:
1. Start music streaming playback
2. Navigate using voice guidance simultaneously
3. After extended operation (around 6 hours), audio stops
4. HMI shows media player still in PLAYING state
5. No audio output from speakers

Expected Result: Audio should continue playing without interruption

Actual Result: Audio stops but HMI shows PLAYING state. System appears hung.

Frequency: Intermittent - occurs after 4-8 hours of continuous use

Environment: Vehicle Test, SW Version BUILD-2026.06.29-001
